baseline_note: Baseline corpus = 6562 titles from the original 2026-04-25 bootstrap run (source_run empty in gold.csv). Grown gold = 9467 rows (1968 in / 6572 peripheral / 578 out / 300 uncertain / 37 redirect / 12 redlink) after the 2026-05-02 5-cell agent matrix added 1,350 audited rows on top of the prior 1,555 from 2026-04-26. Precision/recall recomputed as: of baseline titles with an audited verdict in current gold, fraction that are in/peripheral (precision); of all in/peripheral titles in current gold, fraction in baseline corpus (recall).
